sentences.target: Je porte une veste légère aujourd'hui.

translations.fr: Je porte une veste légère aujourd'hui.
translations.en: I'm wearing a light jacket today.
translations.de: Ich trage heute eine leichte Jacke.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天穿着一件薄外套。
translations.pt: Hoje estou usando um casaco leve.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi mặc một chiếc áo khoác mỏng.
translations.nl: Ik draag vandaag een lichte jas.
translations.hi: मैं आज हल्की जैकेट पहन रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Dziś mam na sobie lekką kurtkę.
translations.nb: I dag har jeg på meg en lett jakke.
translations.id: Hari ini saya memakai jaket tipis.
translations.sv: I dag har jag på mig en lätt jacka.
translations.cs: Dnes mám na sobě lehkou bundu.
translations.da: I dag har jeg en let jakke på.
translations.fi: Tänään minulla on kevyt takki päällä.
translations.ja: 今日は薄手のジャケットを着ています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; functions as the subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; agrees with ‘Je’ and expresses the action of wearing.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner introducing the noun ‘veste’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘porte’.
Adjective, feminine singular; modifies ‘veste’ and agrees in gender and number.
Temporal adverb; modifies the verb phrase, indicating time.

sentences.target: Tu peux porter ce sac pour moi.
sentences.reading: /ty pø pɔʁte sə sak puʁ mwa/

translations.fr: Tu peux porter ce sac pour moi.
translations.ipa: /ty pø pɔʁte sə sak puʁ mwa/
translations.en: Can you carry this bag for me?
translations.de: Kannst du diese Tasche für mich tragen?
translations.it: Puoi portare questa borsa per me?
translations.ko: 이 가방 좀 들어 줄 수 있어?
translations.zh-Hans: 你能帮我拎一下这个袋子吗？
translations.yue: 你可唔可以幫我拎呢個袋呀？
translations.ru: Можешь понести эту сумку для меня?
translations.pt: Você pode carregar esta sacola para mim?
translations.he: אתה יכול לסחוב את השקית הזאת בשבילי?
translations.tr: Bu çantayı benim için taşıyabilir misin?
translations.vi: Bạn có thể mang giúp tôi cái túi này không?
translations.ar: هل يمكنك حمل هذه الحقيبة من أجلي؟
translations.nl: Kun je deze tas voor mij dragen?
translations.uk: Можеш понести цю сумку для мене?
translations.hi: क्या तुम मेरे लिए यह बैग उठा सकते हो?
translations.pl: Czy możesz ponieść tę torbę dla mnie?
translations.el: Μπορείς να κουβαλήσεις αυτή την τσάντα για μένα;
translations.nb: Kan du bære denne posen for meg?
translations.id: Bisakah kamu membawakan tas ini untukku?
translations.sv: Kan du bära den här påsen åt mig?
translations.ro: Poți să cari sacoșa asta pentru mine?
translations.da: Kan du bære denne pose for mig?
translations.ja: この袋を持ってくれますか？

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; functions as the subject.
Modal auxiliary in present indicative, 2nd person singular; selects an infinitive (‘porter’) as its complement.
Infinitive main verb; complement of the modal ‘peux’, expressing the action.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies the noun ‘sac’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of the infinitive ‘porter’.
Preposition; introduces a prepositional phrase indicating beneficiary.
Disjunctive (stressed) pronoun, 1st person singular; object of the preposition ‘pour’.

sentences.target: On porte des masques dans le métro.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ pɔʁt de mask dɑ̃ lə metʁo/

translations.fr: On porte des masques dans le métro.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ pɔʁt de mask dɑ̃ lə metʁo/
translations.en: We wear masks on the subway.
translations.de: Wir tragen in der U-Bahn Masken.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đeo khẩu trang trên tàu điện ngầm.
translations.nl: We dragen mondkapjes in de metro.
translations.hi: हम मेट्रो में मास्क पहनते हैं.
translations.id: Kami memakai masker di kereta bawah tanah.
translations.ja: 私たちは地下鉄でマスクを着けます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun (grammatically 3rd person singular), often meaning ‘we’ in spoken French.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with ‘On’.
Indefinite plural article; determiner modifying ‘masques’.
Common noun, plural; direct object of ‘porte’.
Preposition; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for ‘métro’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘dans’.

sentences.target: Nous allons porter les cartons au garage.
sentences.reading: /nu zalɔ̃ pɔʁte le kaʁtɔ̃ o gaʁaʒ/

translations.fr: Nous allons porter les cartons au garage.
translations.ipa: /nu zalɔ̃ pɔʁte le kaʁtɔ̃ o gaʁaʒ/
translations.en: We're going to carry the boxes to the garage.
translations.es: Vamos a llevar las cajas al garaje.
translations.de: Wir werden die Kartons in die Garage tragen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们要把箱子搬到车库里。
translations.yue: 我哋會將啲紙箱搬去車房。
translations.pt: Vamos levar as caixas para a garagem.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ chuyển các thùng đến nhà để xe.
translations.nl: We gaan de dozen naar de garage dragen.
translations.hu: El fogjuk vinni a dobozokat a garázsba.
translations.hi: हम बक्से गैरेज तक ले जाएंगे.
translations.el: Θα μεταφέρουμε τα κουτιά στο γκαράζ.
translations.nb: Vi skal bære eskene til garasjen.
translations.id: Kami akan mengangkat kotak-kotak itu ke garasi.
translations.sv: Vi ska bära lådorna till garaget.
translations.da: Vi skal bære kasserne til garagen.
translations.ja: 私たちは箱をガレージに運びます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural; functions as the subject.
Semi-auxiliary in present indicative, 1st person plural; forms the near future with an infinitive (‘porter’).
Infinitive main verb; complement of the semi-auxiliary ‘allons’, expressing the intended action.
Definite article, plural; determiner modifying ‘cartons’.
Common noun, plural; direct object of ‘porter’.
Contraction of the preposition ‘à’ and the definite article ‘le’; introduces a prepositional complement indicating destination/location.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘au’.
